title: mentha pseudoparviflora
intro: Mentha pseudoparviflora, also known as the Australian pennyroyal, is a perennial herb belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae). It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to act as a natural antispasmodic, antiseptic, and anti-inflammatory agent. The health benefits of Mentha pseudoparviflora include its potential to aid in digestion, relieve menstrual cramps and other symptoms associated with PMS, and exhibit antioxidant properties. In herbal preparations, Mentha pseudoparviflora is often used in teas, essential oils, and topical creams to harness its medicinal benefits.
